g.inkscape:label: Layer 1
g.text: levelling the ground across Linux distros

text.style: line-height:normal;font-family:'DejaVu Sans', Arial, sans-serif;-inkscape-font-specification:'DejaVu Sans, Arial, sans-serif, Normal';font-variation-settings:normal;text-align:start;text-decoration-color:#000000;writing-mode:lr-tb;direction:ltr;white-space:pre;shape-inside:url(#rect17);display:inline;vector-effect:none;fill:#c83737;fill-opacity:1;stroke:#c83737;stroke-width:0.999999;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;stroke-miterlimit:4;stroke-dasharray:none;stroke-dashoffset:0;stroke-opacity:1;-inkscape-stroke:none
